problem id: 012fb81b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10000100 -> 00000000
  01101111 -> 10100011
  01001111 -> 10100010
  00010010 -> 00000000
  10010100 -> 00000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  01011001 -> 00100000
  00010100 -> 00000000
  00111000 -> 00000000
  01110000 -> 00000000

query: 10101101
predicted answer: 10000100
